title: Psilocybin-assisted psychotherapy for treatment resistant depression: A randomized clinical trial evaluating repeated doses of psilocybin

L2: Repeated doses of psilocybin showed greater antidepressant effects in treatment-resistant depression
Psilocybin-assisted psychotherapy demonstrates significant efficacy with adequate safety profile
L3: Randomized clinical trial evaluating repeated 25mg psilocybin doses for treatment-resistant depression, including participants with major depressive disorder and bipolar II disorder, demonstrating significant antidepressant effects with preparation and integration psychotherapy sessions
